settings.theme.title: Theme
learn.title: What to learn next
learn.subtitle: AI picks your next node based on what you've mastered. Write your understanding, AI judges it.
learn.loginRequired: Sign in to track your learning progress
learn.loginRequiredHint: The graph itself is public, but progress needs to be tied to your email.
learn.explainPlaceholder: Explain this node in your own words. AI will judge whether you've met the mastery criteria.
learn.allDoneTitle: 🎉 You've mastered every node in this track!
learn.allDoneHint: Switch to another track to continue.
learn.confirmReset: Reset all learning progress? This cannot be undone.
learn.errors.emptyText: Write your understanding first, then submit.
admin.overview.title: Operations Dashboard
admin.overview.subtitle: System status, knowledge bases, curriculum and members at a glance.
admin.overview.membersComingSoonHint: Email login + Feishu member table + paywall
admin.overview.tip: Existing pages (Knowledge / Settings / Curriculum) remain reachable on their own routes — this view only aggregates.
admin.members.title: Member Management
admin.members.subtitle: Manage login emails, chat history, and usage time.
admin.members.plan: This page will deliver three things during Day 3-4:
admin.members.emailDesc: Email OTP login + Feishu member table
admin.members.chatDesc: View each member's sessions and messages
admin.members.usageDesc: Cumulative time / reports generated / last active
admin.members.devPlan: Port the lightweight login model from fantao-jinjin-ai → wire SQLite + Feishu → render list and details here.
admin.system.title: System Diagnostics
admin.system.subtitle: Test LLM / Embedding connectivity and inspect runtime topology.
admin.system.testLLMDesc: Run a single LLM round-trip to verify connectivity and report latency / model info.
admin.system.testEmbedDesc: Issue a minimal embedding request to confirm the vector pipeline is healthy.
admin.members.empty: No members have logged in yet
admin.members.emptyHint: Members will appear here after their first email login.
admin.members.tip: Chat history and total usage time will be wired in Day 5 after existing sessions are linked to members.
admin.feedback.title: User Feedback
admin.feedback.subtitle: Feedback submitted by users via the /feedback page.
admin.feedback.emptyHint: Feedback will appear here once users submit via the /feedback page.
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Email OTP login. Admin emails are configured via ADMIN_EMAILS in .env.
login.adminRequired: Admin role required for that page. Please sign in with an admin email.
login.devModeHint: Dev mode: SMTP not configured — code printed to backend console.
login.footnote: We use an HTTP-only cookie for session — no credentials are stored in the browser.
curriculum.title: Learning Path Editor
curriculum.subtitle: Adjust the seller and operator tracks here, including each gate, common questions, and the pass standard. Once saved, the homepage, chat guidance, and coach entry points update together.
curriculum.gatesHint: Each gate should represent one stage of understanding. Focus on the gate description, common questions, and the pass standard.
curriculum.fields.title: Track title
curriculum.fields.subtitle: Track subtitle
hub.title: Train new sellers. Onboard operators. Turn scattered know-how into repeatable execution.
hub.subtitle: This refit turns DeepTutor into a role-based learning system for reverse-commerce growth. Start from the right lane, work from knowledge sources and pass manuals, and let learning coaches turn scattered know-how into a clear growth path.
track.seller.title: New Seller Launch Lane
track.seller.subtitle: Guide first-time sellers from market choice to profitable daily operation.
track.seller.summary: Use this lane when the user still needs help deciding where to sell, what to launch, how to price, and how to avoid early fulfillment or cashflow mistakes.
track.seller.outcome: Target outcome: a seller who can choose a viable market, launch the first offer, build a traffic loop, and run fulfillment without guessing.
track.seller.phases.market.title: Choose the right market to enter
track.seller.phases.market.detail: Clarify demand, site fit, category constraints, and first-entry risk before committing resources.
track.seller.phases.offer.title: Build a viable first offer
track.seller.phases.offer.detail: Define selection logic, pricing, margins, merchandising, and proof points for the first SKU set.
track.seller.phases.traffic.title: Create the first traffic loop
track.seller.phases.traffic.detail: Design channel mix, content rhythm, paid traffic boundaries, and conversion checkpoints for week one to week four.
track.seller.phases.fulfillment.title: Stabilize delivery and service
track.seller.phases.fulfillment.detail: Set operating rules for inventory, shipping, customer service, refunds, and margin protection.
track.seller.actions.launchPlan.title: Build a 30-day launch plan
track.seller.actions.launchPlan.descript: Start a guided coaching session for the seller's first month.
track.seller.actions.launchPlan.prompt: Build a 30-day launch plan for a first-time reverse-commerce seller. Break it into weekly goals, required inputs, checkpoints, and the most common execution mistakes.
track.seller.actions.marginAudit.title: Audit pricing and margin logic
track.seller.actions.marginAudit.descrip: Stress test the business model before scaling traffic.
track.seller.actions.marginAudit.prompt: Create a pricing and margin audit framework for a new reverse-commerce seller. Cover procurement, fulfillment, platform fees, marketing, return risk, and the minimum healthy contribution margin.
track.seller.actions.marketResearch.desc: Launch a deep research report for the seller lane.
track.seller.actions.marketResearch.prom: Produce a deep research brief for a new reverse-commerce seller entering a new market. Compare demand, margin structure, traffic channels, operational complexity, and the first 90-day execution priorities.
track.operator.title: Platform Operator Enablement Lane
track.operator.subtitle: Teach new operators how to recruit merchants, activate supply, and keep category growth healthy.
track.operator.summary: Use this lane when the user needs help building merchant pipelines, category rules, growth rituals, and governance standards for a reverse-commerce platform.
track.operator.outcome: Target outcome: an operator who can recruit the right merchants, activate supply quickly, drive weekly growth, and keep service quality under control.
track.operator.phases.recruitment.title: Recruit the right merchants
track.operator.phases.recruitment.detail: Define target merchant profiles, category priorities, outreach scripts, and qualification criteria.
track.operator.phases.activation.title: Accelerate merchant activation
track.operator.phases.activation.detail: Build onboarding workflows, first-listing checklists, and success criteria for the first active days.
track.operator.phases.growth.title: Run category growth routines
track.operator.phases.growth.detail: Design merchant segmentation, campaign calendars, traffic allocation rules, and weekly review rhythm.
track.operator.phases.governance.title: Protect platform quality
track.operator.phases.governance.detail: Set standards for service, refunds, merchant health, and escalation before scale creates chaos.
track.operator.actions.activationPlan.de: Open a coaching session focused on operator onboarding.
track.operator.actions.activationPlan.pr: Build a 90-day enablement plan for a new reverse-commerce platform operator. Break it into merchant recruitment, activation, growth operations, and governance milestones with weekly rituals.
track.operator.actions.segmentation.desc: Turn raw merchant supply into a manageable operating model.
track.operator.actions.segmentation.prom: Design a merchant segmentation framework for a reverse-commerce platform operator. Include merchant tiers, key KPIs, support strategy, traffic policy, and the weekly operating rhythm for each tier.
Launch a deep research report for marketplace operations.

Produce a deep research brief for a reverse-commerce platform operator. Cover merchant acquisition, category growth mechanics, traffic distribution, service governance, and the first 90-day priorities for a new category.
systemBlocks.knowledge.title: Knowledge Sources
systemBlocks.knowledge.description: Load SOPs, category notes, case studies, research, and operating theory into one searchable source layer.
systemBlocks.coaches.title: Learning Coaches
systemBlocks.coaches.description: Role-specific coach bots keep seller and operator guidance consistent across every session.
systemBlocks.playbooks.title: Pass Manuals
systemBlocks.playbooks.description: Convert repeated explanations, flows, and cases into reusable learning manuals.
chatGuide.title: Start from the right lane, then let the system coach the next move.
chatGuide.subtitle: Choose a lane first. This chat workspace is tuned for reverse-commerce onboarding, with role-specific prompts designed to turn knowledge and theory into concrete operating action.
chatGuide.playbookNote: Best results come from connecting your knowledge vault before generating plans and reports.
coach.seller.title: Beginner Seller Learning Coach
coach.seller.description: Help new sellers understand reverse haitao concepts, the buyer journey, promotion partnerships, and how to review early order results.
coach.seller.focus: Best for: concept calibration, purchase-flow mapping, overseas promotion basics, platform/influencer cooperation, and post-order review practice.
coach.operator.title: Platform Operator Learning Coach
coach.operator.description: Help new platform operators understand reverse haitao, sourcing and warehouse flows, admin systems, creator partnerships, and finance/growth/risk/system models.
coach.operator.focus: Best for: business-chain literacy, sourcing and warehouse processes, platform admin operations, influencer cooperation, and operating-model training.
agents.title: Learning Coach Console
agents.subtitle: This is not about promising instant sales or instant platform growth. It helps beginner sellers and operators progress through concepts, flows, models, and review habits.
agents.roleEntryTitle: Start from the learning path, not from configuration.
agents.roleEntrySubtitle: Most beginners should start with the seller or operator coach and work through each gate's common questions and pass standard. Custom setup is only for new specialist roles.
agents.noExtraBotsHint: The seller and operator learning coaches are ready. Add another coach only when you need a new specialist role.
book.library.title: Books
book.library.subtitle: Generate, browse and study your AI-authored books.
book.library.noDescription: No description yet. Open the book to view its outline.
book.library.emptySubtitle: Create your first AI-generated book from a knowledge base, chat selections, notebooks, or simply a topic.
book.creator.title: Create a new book
book.creator.subtitle: Describe what you want to learn, then pick the knowledge sources to fuse into a structured, interactive book.
book.creator.intentPlaceholder: e.g. Understand reverse haitao buyer flows, platform relationships, and beginner mistakes.
book.creator.emptyKnowledgeBases: No knowledge bases yet. Create one in the Knowledge page first.
book.creator.emptyNotebooks: No notebooks yet. Save chat outputs into a notebook first.
book.creator.emptyQuizCategories: No quiz categories yet. Bookmark questions into a category first.
book.creator.proposalHint: Edit anything below, then confirm to generate the chapter spine.
book.creator.noKbsSelectedGeneral: No knowledge bases selected. The book will rely on general knowledge.
book.spine.title: Review the chapter spine
book.spine.subtitle: Reorder, rename, or remove chapters before the book starts compiling.
book.spine.contentTypeHelp: Hint that drives the chapter's block plan, such as text length or whether to include diagrams, quizzes, or code.
book.spine.architectHint: Hint for the architect about what blocks to plan.
book.spine.type.theoryDesc: Long-form explanation with diagrams, flash cards, and a quiz.
book.spine.type.derivationDesc: Step-by-step derivation, often with animation or verifying code.
book.spine.type.historyDesc: Narrative, timeline, and period image, ending with a recap quiz.
book.spine.type.practiceDesc: Quiz-heavy chapter with runnable code scaffold and explanation.
book.spine.type.conceptDesc: Definition, figure, flash cards, and common-pitfall callout.
book.reader.selectChapter: Select a chapter to start reading.
book.reader.noBlocks: This page has no blocks yet.
book.sidebar.pagesWillAppear: Pages will appear here once the spine is confirmed.
book.chat.title: Page Chat
book.chat.emptyHint: Ask a question about this page. Context from the book and chapter is sent automatically.
book.progress.stage.ideationDesc: Drafting the proposal from your inputs.
book.progress.stage.explorationDesc: Parallel multi-query retrieval across your KBs.
book.progress.stage.synthesisDesc: Spine and concept graph draft and revise.
book.progress.stage.overviewDesc: Auto-built table of contents and concept map.
book.confirm.deleteBook: Delete this book? This cannot be undone.
book.health.kbChanged: Your knowledge bases changed since this book was generated.
book.health.stalePages: {{count}} previously-compiled pages may be out of date.
book.health.markAsSeenTitle: Mark the current KB state as the new baseline. This will not recompile pages; use the recompile button for that.

research.stage.understand.title: Understand the question
research.stage.understand.hint: Clarify the topic and research goal first.
research.stage.decompose.title: Decompose the topic
research.stage.decompose.hint: Split the question into searchable, learnable sub-topics.
research.stage.evidence.title: Gather evidence
research.stage.evidence.hint: Collect and organize evidence from the selected sources.
research.stage.result.title: Form the result
research.stage.result.hint: Compose the gathered evidence into the final output.
Describe what you want to learn: Describe what you want to learn
Describe what you want to learn on the l: Describe what you want to learn on the left, and your guided learning sessions will appear here.
For example: Teach me linear algebra fro: For example: Teach me linear algebra from the basics, with intuition, key formulas, and common mistakes.
Open any page once it is ready. Early st: Open any page once it is ready. Early stages are prioritized.
This page failed to generate. You can re: This page failed to generate. You can retry it from the tab bar.
Waiting for the selected interactive pag: Waiting for the selected interactive page...

settingsTour.llm.title: 1 / 5 — LLM
settingsTour.llm.desc: Pick the active LLM profile, endpoint, and model used for chat and reasoning.
settingsTour.embedding.title: 2 / 5 — Embedding
settingsTour.embedding.desc: Configure the embedding provider and model used for knowledge retrieval.
settingsTour.search.title: 3 / 5 — Search
settingsTour.search.desc: Set an optional web-search provider and any related network settings.
settingsTour.saveTest.title: 4 / 5 — Save & Test
settingsTour.saveTest.desc: After editing, click Save Draft to persist your changes to the catalog. Then open Diagnostics below and Run Test to verify the connection works.
settingsTour.apply.title: 5 / 5 — Apply
settingsTour.apply.desc: Once the test passes, click Apply to write the active configuration into .env so DeepTutor starts using it immediately.
settings.configNote: Save Draft persists all profiles to model_catalog.json, which DeepTutor reads at runtime. Apply syncs the active profile into .env for CLI and non-UI compatibility. You can keep multiple profiles in the catalog and switch between them anytime.
This knowledge base needs reindex before: This knowledge base needs reindex before it can accept new files.
Once a knowledge base is ready, it stays: Once a knowledge base is ready, it stays clean here as a reusable resource instead of showing stale completion banners.

learn.badges.title: Achievement Badges
learn.roadmap.outcome: When done you'll be able to:
